landing.title: BOARDS
landing.subtitle: Business-Oriented Aggregator of Random Data and Systems

about.title: About us
about.paragraph1: In today's fast-paced world, staying organized shouldn't require juggling a dozen different tools. BOARDS is an interactive web dashboard designed to bring everything you need into one clean, intuitive interface — whether you're managing a team project or simply keeping your personal life on track. We built BOARDS because we believe that clarity and simplicity are the foundation of great work.
about.paragraph2: BOARDS is built for everyone. Teams use it to coordinate projects, allocate resources, and keep everyone aligned — all in real time. Individuals use it as a personal organizer to capture notes, track tasks, and surface the information that matters most. No matter how you work, BOARDS adapts to fit your flow, not the other way around.
about.paragraph3: Our mission is straightforward: eliminate the friction between you and your goals. By combining task management, note-taking, and information organization into a single unified workspace, BOARDS helps you spend less time searching and more time doing. One place. Everything you need. Always in reach.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.disclaimer: By registering, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signUp.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 4 characters long
signUp.usernameTooLong: Username must be no more than 63 characters long
signUp.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
signUp.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS_USE_ANOTHER_EMAIL: A user with this email already exists
signUp.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.registerLine: Create an account to get started.
signIn.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
signIn.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.resetText: We'll send you an email with instructions to reset your password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.thanks: Thanks for signing up! To complete the registration process, please verify your email address.
verifyEmail.paragraph1: A verification email has been sent to
verifyEmail.paragraph2: . Please check your inbox and click the verification link to verify your email address.
